title: Serapias gigantea
taxonomy: Serapias gigantea is a species of orchid that belongs to the genus Serapias, which is part of the subfamily Orchidoideae within the family Orchidaceae. This classification indicates its status as a type of flowering plant. The Serapias genus is characterized by its distinctive lip shape and often found in open areas. As a member of the Orchidoideae subfamily, Serapias gigantea is closely related to other orchids. The classification of Serapias gigantea also reflects its evolutionary relationships with other flowering plants.
